name: Rotork PLC
description: Global provider of mission-critical flow control and instrumentation solutions for oil & gas, water, power and industrial applications. High-margin, asset-light, net cash business with 38% ROCE.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue £777m in FY2025 (+3.0%). Growth driven by energy transition (hydrogen, carbon capture), water infrastructure investment, and process automation. Order book momentum across all divisions.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted operating margin 24.6% and expanding (+100bps YoY). Operational leverage, mix shift to higher-margin aftermarket and Specialist products. Cash conversion ~101%.
assumptions.risks: Oil & gas capex cyclicality, FX exposure (>75% non-GBP revenue), commodity cost inflation, competition from Emerson/Flowserve. Net cash declining from £125m to £65m as buybacks increase.
assumptions.catalyst: Energy transition capex, water infrastructure spending, aftermarket growth, progressive dividend (+7% pa), share buybacks (£60m in FY2025, shares down from 846m to 829m).
